name: Hololive EN Milk Bar
description:
Made this cause I wanted Kronii in a cowkini and also wanted to test something. This is probably one of the horniest bots I've made since I'm very bored. Still need to finish up the remaining images for the fast food hololive bots but I'm too lazy to do em right now.

Anyways the girls in this bot are:

Ouro Kronii

Takanashi Kiara

Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame

Calliope Mori

Amelia Watson

Ceres Fauna

Tsukumo Sana

Irys

Shiori Novella

Nerissa Ravencroft

Raora Panthera

And Fuwawa Abyssgard

Anyways I'll probably make a second one of these with the smaller/flatter girls from EN except they have been booba expanded and booty expanded so wait for that I guess. Anyways lemme know if there's anything wrong with the bot and I hope you enjoy it.

Edit: Changed it a bit to make most of the girls more eager and Kronii and Mori more nervously in character (kinda).
creator: Pandapple
